name: 吳昭正
objective:
學習 C 語言的用法，包括：變數、表示式、敘述、形態宣告、 控制結構、函式、陣列、指標、結構、檔案處理、及格式化輸出 / 輸入等用法，以作業及期末專題強化學習效果。
Learn C programming, including: usage of variable, expression, statement, type declaration, control structure, function, array, pointer, structure, file processing, and formatted I/O. In this course, assignments and term projects will be emphasized to strengthen the learning.
schedule:
Week 1(9/9). Introduction 
Week 2(9/16). Introduction of Integrated Development Environment
Week 3(9/23). Basics
Week 4(9/30). Selection and Repetition
Week 5(10/7). Variables and Arrays
Week 6(10/14). Functions
Week 7(10/21). Algorithms and Recursion
Week 8(10/28). Pointer
Week 9(11/4). C Strings
Week 10(11/11). Self-defined data types in C
Week 11(11/18). Classes
Week 12(11/25). Operator Overloading
Week 13(12/2). C++ Strings, file IO, and header files
Week 14(12/9). Inheritance and Polymorphism
Week 15(12/16). Templates and exception handling
Week 16(12/23). Final Project (I)
Week 17(12/30). Final Project (II)
Week 18(1/6). Final Project (III)
scorePolicy:
Homework: 60%
Final Project: 40%
Attendance: -1% for each absence recorded
Bonus (if available): 10%
Total: 110%
materials:
主要教材：投影片與網路教材
參考教材：
1. 臺大資管系孔令傑老師的線上程式設計課程
https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLMHSr8fseBzUvwjKtR6pX0Vv9Q9H-V3lY&si=QrUUPicdD2amB9dp
2. C Programming Language, 2nd edition, by Kernighan Brian W. and Ritchie Dennis, Pearson, 1988.
3. C++ Primer, 5th edition, by Stanley Lippman, Josée Lajoie, and Barbara Moo, Addison-Wesley Professional, 2012.
4. Beginning C++ Through Game Programming, 4th edition, by Michael Dawson, Cengage Learning PTR, 2014.
5. 由片語學習 C 程式設計（第二版）, 劉邦 著，國立臺灣大學出版中心，2019.
課程是否導入AI: ● 鼓勵學生使用生成式 AI 工具（Encourage students to use generative AI tools）● 簡單介紹 AI 的基本概念（Briefly introduce the basic concept of AI）
